pageContext.name: Optimus Prime
pageContext.description: Even if you defeat me, Megatron, others will rise to defeat your tyranny.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Optimus Prime Fine Art Print by artist Orlando Arocena.  This portrait is more than meets the eye! Optimus Prime, leader of the Autobots, is expertly rendered here in Orlando Arocena's signature vector art style, with a mixture of detailed screentone effects and flares highlighting his iconic mechanical silhouette. A black and red grid background inspired by classic Transformers imagery frames the fan-favorite character, representing the heroic side of Cybertron. A beacon of justice against the onslaught of Megatron and his Decepticons, the red and blue Transformer inspires others to stand up for what is right across every world.  Each Optimus Prime Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces, making this Transformers wall art a must-have for fans. Pair this portrait with the Megatron Fine Art Print by Orlando Arocena for the ultimate showdown between the Autobots and Decepticons in your collection.  Bring a spark of hope to your collection with the Optimus Prime Fine Art Print by Orlando Arocena today!
